messages.content:
revised

Implementation of all codes goes through 3 stages within a period of time not exceeding 60 seconds :

1.	Overhead announcement
2.	Send SMS
3.	Release Email

The deployment of all codes follows a three-stage process that must be completed within 60 seconds:

1. An overhead announcement is made.
2. An SMS is sent.
3. An email is released.

Revised

Code implementation stages

The stages of code implementation are as follows, and each of them must be completed within 60 seconds:

1. An overhead announcement is made to notify all relevant parties.
2. An SMS is sent to ensure quick communication.
3. An email is released with detailed information and instructions.

نقح

Code implementation stages

مراحل تنفيذ الرموز :

تتم عملية تنفيذ الرموز من خلال ثلاث مراحل يجب إنجازها خلال فترة لا تتجاوز 60 ثانية:

1. إعلان فوق الرأس لإبلاغ جميع الأطراف المعنية.
2. إرسال رسالة قصيرة لضمان التواصل السريع.
3. إصدار بريد إلكتروني بمعلومات وتعليمات مفصلة.

نقح العبارة بالإنجليزي

Code implementation stages

The revised phrase:

Stages of code implementation: 

The code implementation process follows a three-stage approach that must be completed within 60 seconds:

1. An overhead announcement is made to inform all relevant parties.
2. An SMS is sent to ensure rapid communication.
3. An email is released that contains detailed information and instructions.
أحتاج إيميل شكر فخم وراقي للفريق والزملاء والشركاء والداعمين بمناسبة حصول أقسام مركز الإتصالات على إعتماد أفضل بيئة عمل في السعودية لعام 2023

Subject: Congratulations on Winning the Best Workplace Environment Accreditation

Dear Team, Colleagues, Partners, and Supporters,

I take immense pleasure in announcing that our contact center departments have won the prestigious Best Workplace Environment Accreditation for the year 2023 in Saudi Arabia. This remarkable achievement is a testament to our continuous efforts to create a holistic and enriching work environment for our employees, where success, creativity, and innovation thrive.

We would not have achieved this milestone without your dedicated contributions and unwavering support. Your passion, commitment, and teamwork have played an instrumental role in this accomplishment, establishing new benchmarks in the industry and solidifying our brand's reputation.

I extend my heartfelt gratitude to each one of you; it is the collective efforts in creating a happy, inclusive, and fulfilling work environment that make our organization a great place to work.

Let's celebrate this win and work even harder to make a brighter and more successful future together.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
ايميل اخر

Subject: Celebration of Best Workplace Environment Accreditation

Dear Team, Colleagues, Partners, and Supporters,

I am thrilled and proud to convey the news of our contact center departments winning the Best Workplace Environment Accreditation for the year 2023 in Saudi Arabia. This incredible accomplishment is a testament to the unrelenting commitment and hard work each one of you has put in to make our organization a great place to work.

Your dedication, resilience, and relentless pursuit of excellence have set a new standard in the industry and solidified our position as a trailblazer in fostering a positive work culture. This recognition reaffirms our belief that a collaborative and happy work environment is the cornerstone of a successful and thriving business.

I want to congratulate each one of you for contributing to this momentous achievement. The journey to get here wasn't easy, and I sincerely appreciate your unwavering dedication to making this happen. I want to extend my wholehearted appreciation to our supporters and partners, who have played an indispensable role in our success.

Our success would not be complete without coming together to celebrate this significant achievement. I would like to invite you all to join us for a celebratory event on Friday, 15 November, at 5:00 pm at the office. Let's raise a toast to this achievement and to our continued success.

Once again, congratulations to everyone on this fantastic achievement.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
أحتاج إيميل شكر فخم وراقي للفريق والزملاء والشركاء والداعمين بمناسبة إستلام أقسام مركز الإتصالات على شهادة إعتماد أفضل بيئة عمل في السعودية لعام 2023

Subject: Expressing Gratitude on Winning the Best Workplace Environment Accreditation

Dear Team, Colleagues, Partners, and Supporters,

It is my pleasure to extend my heartfelt thanks and gratitude to each one of you on behalf of the contact center departments for winning the Best Workplace Environment Accreditation for the year 2023 in Saudi Arabia.

This is a remarkable achievement that we should take immense pride in. It is a testament to the collective efforts of all of our team members in cultivating a work environment that fosters a supportive and engaging culture. Our commitment to providing a holistic and fulfilling work experience has earned us the recognition and admiration of industry leaders and stakeholders.

I want to thank each one of our team members for their unwavering dedication, passion, and hard work that has brought us this far. Your inputs, expertise, and commitment have made it possible for us to achieve this milestone.

I also want to extend my appreciation to our partners and supporters who have played a vital role in supporting our initiatives to make our company the best place to work.

Once again, congratulations to all of us for this outstanding achievement. Let us continue to strive harder to maintain and surpass these industry standards.

Let us come together to celebrate this remarkable achievement at our upcoming celebration event.

Thank you again for all your support and effort.

Sincerely,

[Your name]

revised

Congratulations on Achieving the Best Places To Work Accreditation for 2023 in Saudi Arabia for IMC & FC Contact Center

Revised:

Subject: Congratulations on Winning the Best Workplace Accreditation for IMC & FC Contact Center in 2023 in Saudi Arabia

Dear Team,

It is with immense pleasure and pride that I announce that our IMC & FC Contact Center has received the Best Workplace Accreditation in Saudi Arabia for 2023. This recognition speaks to the remarkable efforts that we have all put in, and the commitment to creating an inclusive and positive work culture.

This achievement is a testament to your dedication, resilience, and top-notch professionalism, which have set an example for the industry and enabled us to attain this significant milestone.

I want to take this opportunity to express my sincere gratitude to our colleagues, partners, and supporters. Your unwavering support and immense contributions have been critical to this achievement.

We should continue to strive for excellence and work harder to set new industry standards in the coming years. This recognition is a significant achievement, and it is our collective success.

Once again, congratulations to all of us on this outstanding accomplishment. Let's celebrate this exciting news together and look forward to an even brighter future.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]

اختصر هذا العنوان

Congratulations on Achieving the Best Places To Work Accreditation for 2023 in Saudi Arabia for IMC & FC Contact Center

Revised: 

Best Workplace Accreditation for IMC & FC Contact Center 2023 in Saudi Arabia

نقح ايميلي

Dear All,

I am delighted to extend my warmest congratulations to the team, colleagues, partners, and supporters on achieving the Best Places To Work accreditation in Saudi Arabia for the year 2023.

This amazing accomplishment would not have been possible without the outstanding and exceptional efforts of the team who have worked diligently and devotedly. You are all the main pillars in the success you have achieved.

I want to express my gratitude and appreciation for the efforts you have exerted to achieve this great accomplishment, and I value your efforts and dedication in creating an ideal work environment that reflects your commitment to quality, innovation, and creativity.

I would also like to thank the partners and supporters ( Top Management, HCM, Marketing, QIPS, IT, PX, Finance ) who contributed to this achievement and who share with us the trust and confidence in our ability to succeed.

Finally, I want to express my pride and admiration for each and every one of you, and encourage you to continue working hard and devotedly to achieve more accomplishments in the future.


Sincerely,

Revised:

Dear Team, Colleagues, Partners, and Supporters,

I am thrilled to extend my heartfelt congratulations to all of you on the incredible achievement of attaining the Best Places to Work Accreditation in Saudi Arabia for the year 2023. This recognition speaks volumes about the hard work, passion, and dedication that each one of you has put into creating an innovative and collaborative work environment.

You are the main reason for this phenomenal accomplishment, and I am proud of your outstanding efforts and exceptional teamwork, which allowed us to achieve this significant milestone.

I want to express my profound gratitude and appreciation for your untiring efforts and hard work in expressing your commitment to quality, innovation, and creativity. I would also like to thank our partners and supporters (Top Management, HCM, Marketing, QIPS, IT, PX, Finance) who have contributed to this achievement and who share our optimism about our ability to excel.

I take pride in your achievements and admire your commitment to excellence. Let us use this recognition as a starting point to drive forward and achieve even more greater successes in the future.

Once again, congratulations to all of us on this fantastic accomplishment, and let us continue to work together to achieve greater milestones.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
هذه البيئة المتميزة من العمل لم تكن لتتحقق لولا توافر عناصر نجاح رئيسية من موظفين خلوقين وإدارة عليا محترفة وشركاء نجاح رائعين

Revised:

Our remarkable work environment would not have been possible without key success factors, which include committed employees, professional senior management, and outstanding success partners.

نقح الجملة

هذه البيئة المتميزة من العمل لم تكن لتتحقق لولا توافر عناصر نجاح رئيسية من موظفين خلوقين وإدارة عليا محترفة وشركاء نجاح رائعين

Revised:

The exceptional work environment we have created could not have been possible without the key success factors of having ethical employees, professional senior management, and wonderful success partners.

نقح الجملة بالإنجليزية 

هذه البيئة المتميزة من العمل لم تكن لتتحقق لولا توافر عناصر نجاح رئيسية من موظفين مجتهدين ومنضبطين وملتزمين ومتميزين وعلى قدر عالي من الأخلاق الحميدة وإدارة عليا محترفة تبذل قصارى جهدها لتلبية إحتياجات مزارعيها وشركاء نجاح رائعين يقدمون دومآ النصح والمشورة والمساعدة

Revised:

This exceptional work environment would not have been possible without key success factors: hardworking, disciplined, committed, and outstanding employees with high ethical standards, a professional senior management team that is dedicated to meeting the needs of its farmers, and wonderful success partners who consistently provide advice, counsel, and assistance.
